subcodes.first_line: O Sage! The appointed time hath come, and the All-Wise proclaimeth His Most Glorious Name betwixt earth and heaven, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حکیم قد اتی الحین و الحکیم ینادی باسمه الابهی بین الارض و السماء ولکن الناس
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @call to action, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
